programme.title: The Slit Mouthed Woman 2
programme.desc: 1978, Gifu prefecture, Japan. Three sisters grow up on a chicken farm in a small town. The oldest sister, Yukie, is engaged to be married, the middle sister, Sachiko works at a beauty salon and the youngest, Mayu, is on the track team in high school. Their happy carefree lives are changed forever when Yukie's ex-boyfriend Suzuki commits an atrocious crime with Mayu as the tragic victim. Half-craze

This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

Strange happenings start to occur.

programme.desc: Daniel and Avani harvest cranberries on a floating peat moss island, and they find some long range hunting in the dense Northeastern deer woods.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel joins lifelong friends on a frozen lake to fish below the hard water for landlocked Atlantic salmon, and also searches high in the trees for a chaga mushroom.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: British eccentrics Lou and Gary recently moved to the Yukon and are seeking space for livestock in the gold rush town of Dawson City.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: Bear's Mission With Warwick Davis
programme.desc: Legendary actor Warwick Davis is on a Mission with Bear Grylls in the mountains of the Lake District.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-11
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Anti Galau Bukan Sulap Bukan Mejik
programme.desc: Satga was very wasteful and made his mother angry with him. So Satga was kicked out of the house by his own mother. Satga was confused and unable to access his wealth. Satga was standing on the side of the road when suddenly a criminal hypnotized him, convincing Satga's subconscious that he was a poor man. Eventually, Satga was hit by a woman, who turned out to be Nayla's mother. Nayla was a beaut

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 5 / 正义武馆

programme.title: Seher Hone Ko Hai Ep123

programme.title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di Ep111
programme.desc: Tu Juliet Jatt Di is a Punjabi romance-drama about Heer, a focused student, and Nawab, a carefree Jatt, whose arranged marriage before college leads to a journey of love, clashes, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Dhaakad Beera Ep86
